nav.noNotifications: No notifications yet. Strong job matches will appear here.

footer.tagline: Build standout resumes, scan them against ATS criteria, and discover jobs that actually match your experience — powered by AI.

home.badge: AI resume platform — builder, scanner & job matching
home.heroSubtitle: Create a professional resume in minutes, scan it like a recruiter's ATS would, and match it against real job postings — with AI coaching at every step.
home.ctaSecondary: Try the builder — no account needed
home.howItWorksSubtitle: From a blank page (or an old resume) to a tailored application — in one workspace.
home.step1Text: Import an existing PDF/DOCX resume — parsed automatically — or build one from scratch with guided steps.
home.step2Text: Get a 100-point score with a clear fix-it plan, then let AI tailor bullets and cover letters to a specific job.
home.step3Text: See live US & Canada postings scored against your resume, apply directly, and track every application.
home.featuresTitle: Everything between you and the interview
home.featuresSubtitle: One workspace for writing, scoring, tailoring, and tracking your job applications.
home.feature1Text: Summaries, bullet points, skills, cover letters, and LinkedIn bios — grounded in your real experience, never invented.
home.feature2Text: A score out of 100 across 9 categories — ATS, impact, keywords, grammar, readability and more — with a fix-it plan.
home.feature3Text: Live postings across the US & Canada, scored against your resume with matching and missing skills side by side.
home.feature4Text: Five professional templates with live preview, custom colors and section ordering. Export pixel-perfect PDF or editable Word.
home.feature5Text: Every save is versioned. Duplicate a resume per job, compare versions side by side, and roll back anytime.
home.feature6Text: Save jobs, track applied → interviewing → offer, and get alerts when a new job strongly matches your resume.
home.ctaTitle: Your next role is a better resume away
home.ctaSubtitle: Start free. Build, scan, and match in one sitting — most users finish their first resume in under 15 minutes.

toolsPage.title: AI Writing Tools
toolsPage.subtitle: Generate application materials grounded in your actual resume — nothing invented.

analyzePage.subtitle: Get an objective score out of 100 across nine categories, or paste a job posting to see exactly how well your resume matches — and what to fix.

analyzePage.languageCheckDesc: Weak phrases, filler words, repetition, passive voice and possible spelling issues found in your resume.
analyzePage.nothingMissing: Nothing important is missing — great coverage!
analyzePage.bulletRewritesDesc: Copy the improved versions into the builder — only where they truthfully describe your work.
analyzePage.evidenceMapDesc: Every requirement in the posting, linked to the exact evidence in your resume — or flagged as not found.

radarPage.subtitle: Jobs you qualify for now, jobs you're close to, adjacent paths worth exploring, and who's hiring for your profile.

radarPage.sampleBanner: These are sample jobs for development. Connect live feeds to see real postings.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.q1: What is this tool and how does it work?
faqPage.a1: This is an AI-powered resume builder that helps you create a professional resume step-by-step. Our system guides you through key sections like Contact Info, Education, Experience, and Skills, and provides smart AI suggestions based on your input.
faqPage.q2: How does the AI generate suggestions?
faqPage.a2: We use large language models to analyze your input and offer improvement suggestions for your summary, work experience, and skills. These suggestions are generated in real-time based on best practices and clarity.
faqPage.a3: Yes. All data you enter is stored locally in your browser for privacy. If you choose to save it to our servers (e.g., when logged in), it's encrypted and only accessible by you.
faqPage.q4: Do I need to be a developer to use this?
faqPage.a4: Not at all! The resume builder is designed for anyone — whether you're applying to tech jobs, healthcare, education, or any other field.
faqPage.a5: We offer several clean and modern resume templates, with more coming soon. You can switch templates anytime and preview your resume in real-time.
faqPage.q6: Can I download my resume as a PDF?
faqPage.a6: Yes! Once your resume is complete, you can export it as a professionally formatted PDF file. No watermark, no cost.
